hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -f .workspace.yaml ] && [ -d data ] && [ -z "$(ls -A data/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v .gitkeep)" ]; then echo "This workspace has no data yet. Run /ws-ingest:ingest to auto-populate."; fi'

bash -c 'if [ -f .workspace.yaml ]; then lpid=$(ruby -ryaml -e "puts YAML.safe_load(File.read(%q(.workspace.yaml))).dig(%q(ingest),%q(linear_project_id)) rescue nil" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$lpid" ] && [ -z "${LINEAR_API_KEY:-}" ]; then echo "Linear project linked but LINEAR_API_KEY not set. Add it to .env"; fi; fi'
